title: RNA-Seq Transcriptomic Profiling
author: Coralie Viollet
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This protocol describes the preparation of RNA samples from cell lines generated at CeMM for Illumina based high-throughput sequencing using polyA-enriched library preparation.
steps_raw: This protocol describes the preparation of RNA samples from cell lines generated at CeMM for Illumina based high-throughput sequencing using polyA-enriched library preparation.
